name: order_lookup_tool
description: MCP tool for retrieving order details and listing orders. Supports lookup by order ID and filtering by customer email or fulfillment status.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/order-lookup","description":"MCP server for order lookup operations","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/order-lookup-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "get_order", "description": "Fetch full order details by order ID, including customer, items, and linked shipment", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"description": "Order ID e.g. ORD-1001", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["order_id"]}}, {"name": "list_orders", "description": "List orders for a customer by email address with optional status filter (PENDING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED)", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"customer_email": {"description": "Filter by customer email", "type": "string"}, "status": {"description": "PENDING|SHIPPED|DELIVERED|CANCELLED", "type": "string"}}}}]}

name: order_update_tool
description: MCP tool for updating order records. Supports changing order status and updating the shipping address on an existing order.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/order-update","description":"MCP server for order update operations","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/order-update-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "update_order_status", "description": "Change the fulfillment status of an order (e.g. PENDING -> SHIPPED, SHIPPED -> DELIVERED)", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}, "status": {"description": "PENDING|PROCESSING|SHIPPED|DELIVERED|CANCELLED|RETURNED", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["order_id", "status"]}}, {"name": "update_shipping_addr", "description": "Update the shipping address on an existing order before it has shipped", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}, "street": {"type": "string"}, "city": {"type": "string"}, "state": {"type": "string"}, "zip": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["order_id", "street", "city", "state", "zip"]}}]}

name: order_cancel_tool
description: MCP tool for cancelling orders. Validates cancellation eligibility, cancels the order, and triggers the refund workflow if payment was already captured.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/order-cancel","description":"MCP server for order cancellation","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/order-cancel-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "cancel_order", "description": "Cancel an order by ID with a reason; automatically triggers refund workflow if payment was captured", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}, "reason": {"description": "Cancellation reason (default: customer_request)", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["order_id"]}}]}

name: email_send_tool
description: MCP tool for sending transactional and bulk emails to customers. Supports single recipient emails, bulk campaigns, and template-based messaging.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/email-send","description":"MCP server for sending transactional emails","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/email-send-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "send_email", "description": "Send a transactional email to a single recipient with subject, body, and optional template", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"to": {"description": "Recipient email", "type": "string"}, "subject": {"type": "string"}, "body": {"type": "string"}, "template_id": {"description": "Optional template ID", "type": "string"}, "template_vars": {"description": "Variables for template substitution", "type": "object"}}, "required": ["to"]}}, {"name": "send_bulk_email", "description": "Send the same email to a list of recipients in a single batch operation", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"recipients": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}, "subject": {"type": "string"}, "body": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["recipients", "subject", "body"]}}]}

name: email_template_tool
description: MCP tool for managing reusable email templates. Supports fetching, listing, and creating templates for order confirmations, shipping notifications, and marketing messages.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/email-template","description":"MCP server for email template management","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/email-template-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "get_template", "description": "Fetch an email template by its ID", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"template_id": {"description": "Template ID", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["template_id"]}}, {"name": "list_templates", "description": "List all available email templates", "inputSchema": {"type": "object"}}, {"name": "create_template", "description": "Create a new reusable email template with subject and HTML body", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}, "subject": {"type": "string"}, "html_body": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["name", "subject", "html_body"]}}]}

name: sms_notify_tool
description: MCP tool for sending SMS notifications to customers. Supports individual and bulk SMS delivery for order updates, alerts, and promotions.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/sms-notify","description":"MCP server for SMS notification delivery","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/sms-notify-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "send_sms", "description": "Send an SMS message to a single phone number", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"to": {"description": "E.164 phone number", "type": "string"}, "body": {"description": "SMS body (max 160 chars)", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["to", "body"]}}, {"name": "send_bulk_sms", "description": "Send the same SMS message to a list of phone numbers in one batch", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"recipients": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}, "body": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["recipients", "body"]}}]}

name: payment_status_tool
description: MCP tool for looking up payment status and details for orders. Supports lookup by order ID or payment ID and returns transaction status, amount, and method.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/payment-status","description":"MCP server for payment status lookups","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/payment-status-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "get_payment_status", "description": "Get payment status and transaction details for an order or by payment ID; returns amount, method, and current status", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"description": "Order ID", "type": "string"}, "payment_id": {"description": "Payment ID (alternative to order_id)", "type": "string"}}}}]}

name: inventory_check_tool
description: MCP tool for checking product inventory levels and stock availability. Supports single-SKU and batch lookups showing available units after accounting for reservations.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/inventory-check","description":"MCP server for inventory availability checks","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/inventory-check-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "check_inventory", "description": "Check stock availability and reserved units for a single SKU", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"sku": {"description": "Product SKU", "type": "string"}}, "required": ["sku"]}}, {"name": "check_multiple_inventory", "description": "Batch-check inventory levels for multiple SKUs in a single call", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"skus": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}}, "required": ["skus"]}}]}

name: shipping_track_tool
description: MCP tool for tracking shipments and estimating delivery dates. Supports lookup by shipment ID or order ID and returns carrier, status, location, and estimated delivery.

server.inlineContent: {"name":"io.agentcore/shipping-track","description":"MCP server for shipment tracking and delivery estimation","version":"1.0.0","packages":[{"registryType":"npm","identifier":"@agentcore/shipping-track-mcp","version":"1.0.0","transport":{"type":"stdio"},"environmentVariables":[{"name":"AGENTCORE_ACCESS_TOKEN","description":"OAuth2 bearer token for authentication","isSecret":true}]}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "track_shipment", "description": "Track a shipment by shipment_id or order_id; returns carrier, current status, and last known location", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"shipment_id": {"type": "string"}, "order_id": {"type": "string"}}}}, {"name": "estimate_delivery", "description": "Estimate the delivery date for an order based on its shipment data and carrier transit times", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["order_id"]}}]}

name: returns_processing_tool
description: Remote MCP tool for processing product returns and exchanges. Validates return eligibility, generates return labels, and initiates exchange workflows.

server.inlineContent: {"name": "io.ecommco/returns-processing", "description": "Remote MCP server for product returns and exchanges", "version": "1.0.0", "remotes": [{"type": "streamable-http", "url": "https://returns-mcp.internal.ecommco.com/mcp"}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "check_return_eligibility", "description": "Check if an order is eligible for return based on return window and item condition", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string", "description": "Order ID"}, "reason": {"type": "string", "description": "Return reason: DEFECTIVE|WRONG_ITEM|CHANGED_MIND|OTHER"}}, "required": ["order_id", "reason"]}}, {"name": "create_return_label", "description": "Generate a prepaid return shipping label for an approved return", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"order_id": {"type": "string"}, "carrier_preference": {"type": "string", "description": "Preferred carrier: UPS|FEDEX|USPS"}}, "required": ["order_id"]}}]}

name: loyalty_rewards_tool
description: Remote MCP tool for managing customer loyalty points and rewards. Supports checking point balances, redeeming rewards, and applying discount codes at checkout.

server.inlineContent: {"name": "io.ecommco/loyalty-rewards", "description": "Remote MCP server for loyalty and rewards management", "version": "1.0.0", "remotes": [{"type": "streamable-http", "url": "https://loyalty-mcp.internal.ecommco.com/mcp"}]}

tools.inlineContent: {"tools": [{"name": "get_points_balance", "description": "Get the current loyalty points balance for a customer", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"customer_id": {"type": "string", "description": "Customer ID or email"}}, "required": ["customer_id"]}}, {"name": "redeem_reward", "description": "Redeem loyalty points for a discount on an order", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"customer_id": {"type": "string"}, "order_id": {"type": "string"}, "points_to_redeem": {"type": "integer", "description": "Number of points to redeem"}}, "required": ["customer_id", "order_id", "points_to_redeem"]}}]}

name: payment_refund_agent
description: A2A agent for issuing payment refunds with multi-step validation. Validates the order and payment, determines partial vs full refund amount, issues the refund, and verifies completion.

agentCard.inlineContent: {"$schema": "https://a2a-protocol.org/schemas/0.3/agent-card.schema.json", "name": "PaymentRefundAgent", "description": "Multi-step A2A agent for issuing payment refunds with full validation and status verification", "version": "1.0.0", "url": "https://payment-refund-agent.internal.ecommco.com/agent", "protocolVersion": "0.3", "capabilities": {"streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false}, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain"], "skills": [{"id": "get-order-payment-info", "name": "Get Order Payment Info", "description": "Retrieve payment details and transaction history for an order", "tags": ["payment", "order", "lookup"]}, {"id": "issue-refund", "name": "Issue Refund", "description": "Issue a partial or full refund for an order after validation", "tags": ["payment", "refund"]}, {"id": "get-refund-status", "name": "Get Refund Status", "description": "Check the current status of a refund request", "tags": ["payment", "refund", "status"]}]}

name: inventory_reserve_agent
description: A2A agent for reserving inventory units for orders with rollback support. Checks current stock, creates a reservation, and supports releasing reservations if a downstream step such as payment fails.

agentCard.inlineContent: {"$schema": "https://a2a-protocol.org/schemas/0.3/agent-card.schema.json", "name": "InventoryReserveAgent", "description": "Stateful A2A agent for reserving inventory units with rollback and status tracking", "version": "1.0.0", "url": "https://inventory-reserve-agent.internal.ecommco.com/agent", "protocolVersion": "0.3", "capabilities": {"streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false}, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain"], "skills": [{"id": "reserve-inventory", "name": "Reserve Inventory", "description": "Reserve inventory units for an order to prevent overselling", "tags": ["inventory", "reservation"]}, {"id": "get-reservation-status", "name": "Get Reservation Status", "description": "Check the status of an inventory reservation", "tags": ["inventory", "status"]}, {"id": "release-reservation", "name": "Release Reservation", "description": "Release a previously held inventory reservation", "tags": ["inventory", "rollback"]}]}

name: shipping_update_agent
description: A2A agent for creating shipments and updating shipment status. Selects the best carrier based on weight and destination, creates the shipment record, and confirms status.

agentCard.inlineContent: {"$schema": "https://a2a-protocol.org/schemas/0.3/agent-card.schema.json", "name": "ShippingUpdateAgent", "description": "Multi-step A2A agent for carrier selection, shipment creation, and status updates", "version": "1.0.0", "url": "https://shipping-update-agent.internal.ecommco.com/agent", "protocolVersion": "0.3", "capabilities": {"streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false}, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain"], "skills": [{"id": "assign-carrier", "name": "Assign Carrier", "description": "Select the best carrier based on package weight and destination", "tags": ["shipping", "carrier"]}, {"id": "create-shipment", "name": "Create Shipment", "description": "Create a shipment record and generate tracking number", "tags": ["shipping", "create"]}, {"id": "update-shipment-status", "name": "Update Shipment Status", "description": "Update the status of an existing shipment", "tags": ["shipping", "status"]}]}
